---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FR] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the idea

One paragraph: what should CommitPyramid do that it doesn't today?

## Why

What's the user pain or product value? Don't pitch "would be cool" — explain whom it helps and how.

## Acceptance criteria (rough)

- [ ] Concrete, observable behavior 1
- [ ] Concrete, observable behavior 2

## Out of scope

What this issue explicitly is NOT — to keep the conversation focused.

## Alternatives considered

If you thought about other ways to solve the same problem, mention them.

## Concept fit

Does this match the existing concept (`docs/concept.md`) or is it a new direction? If new, suggest a feature ID (`F-22`, `F-23`...).
